devdoc.details: Factory contract for creating Smart Accounts using CREATE2

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

batchCreateAccounts(address[],bytes32[]).details: Batch create accounts for multiple owners

params.salts: Array of salts corresponding to each owner

params._entryPoint: Address of the ERC-4337 Entry Point contract

createAccount(address,bytes32).details: Creates a new Smart Account for the given owner

params.owner: The owner of the new Smart Account

returns.account: Address of the created Smart Account

getAccount(address).details: Gets the Smart Account address for a given owner

returns.account: The Smart Account address (zero if not created)

getAddress(address,bytes32).details: Computes the address of a Smart Account before deployment

params.owner: The owner of the Smart Account

returns.account: Computed address of the Smart Account

isAccount(address).details: Checks if an address is a Smart Account created by this factory

returns._0: True if the address is a Smart Account

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateImplementation(address).details: Emergency function to upgrade implementation (for security fixes only)

devdoc.title: AccountFactory

userdoc.notice: This factory creates deterministic Smart Account addresses for users
